Dennis J. Byrne, Esq. of ROPERS, MAJESKI 543-4800, for defendant and opposing party Tele-Card, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF PAUL A DOWHAL'S MOTION For Preliminary Injunction -- Granted re: Use of present solicitation form. Court will not dictate form which can be used by defendant for future solicitation. Defendant is prohibited to collect money based on current forms. Bond to be posted in amount of 1,000. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
